column8: Angular red brick and concrete fragments with some grey, silty SAND.(FILL)
Sub-rounded COBBLES and GRAVELS of moderately decomposed granite and tuff with some brown, silty SAND.(ALLUVIUM)

Moderately strong, brownish pink spotted black and white, moderately to slightly decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE with widely to medium spaced and occasionally closely spaced, very narrow, rough planar, limonite, manganese stained and kaolin coated joints, dipping 10 degrees-20 degrees, 30 degrees-40 degrees and vertical joints. No Recovery at 24.60m-24.64m.
